task: In Simple Calendar Pro, create a calendar event on 2023-10-25 at 14h with the title 'Appointment for Project X' and the description 'We will understand software updates. Let's be punctual.'. The event should last for 30 mins.

action.description: Launch the Calendar app to create a new event.
Tap the "New Event" button to create a calendar event.
Tap the "Event" button to create a new calendar event.
Type 'Appointment for Project X' in the Title field.
Tap the Description field to start typing the event description.
Type 'We will understand software updates. Let's be punctual.' in the Description field.
Tap the date field to change the event date to October 25, 2023.
Tap on the date "25" in the calendar to select October 25, 2023.
Tap the "OK" button to confirm the selected date of October 25, 2023.
Tap the start time field to change it from 16:00 to 14:00.
Tap on the "14" hour option in the time picker to set the start time to 14:00.
Tap the "OK" button to confirm the start time of 14:00.
Tap the end time field to change it from 14:00 to 14:30.
Tap on the minute field to change it from 00 to 30.
Tap on the "30" minute option in the time picker to set the end time to 14:30.
Tap the "OK" button to confirm the end time of 14:30.
Tap the Save button to create the calendar event.

task: In Simple Calendar Pro, create a calendar event in two weeks from today at 22h with the title 'Catch up on Campaign' and the description 'We will strategize about client feedback. Please bring relevant documents.'. The event should last for 15 mins.

action.description: Launch the Calendar app to create a new event.
Tap the "New Event" button to create a calendar event.
Tap the "New Event" button to create a new calendar event.
Type "Catch up on Campaign" into the Title field.
Tap the Description field to enter the event description.
Type "We will strategize about client feedback. Please bring relevant documents." into the Description field.
Tap the date field to change the event date to two weeks from today.
Tap on October 29 in the date picker to set the event date.
Tap the "OK" button to confirm the selected date of October 29.
Tap the start time field to change the time from 16:00 to 22:00.
Tap on the 22 hour option in the time picker to set the start time to 22:00.
Tap the "OK" button to confirm the selected time of 22:00.
Tap the end time field to change the time from 22:00 to 22:15.
Tap on the 15-minute option in the time picker to set the end time to 22:15.
Tap on the 15-minute option in the time picker to set the end time to 22:15.
Tap on the hour field to change it from 01 to 22.
Tap on the 22-hour option in the time picker to set the end time to 22:15.
Tap the "OK" button to confirm the selected end time of 22:15.
Tap the Save button to create the calendar event.

task: In Simple Calendar Pro, create a calendar event for this Friday at 11h with the title 'Call with the Team' and the description 'We will explore product launch.'. The event should last for 45 mins.

action.description: Launch the Calendar app to create a new event.
Tap the "New Event" button to create a calendar event.
Tap the "Event" button to create a new calendar event.
Type "Catch up on Campaign" into the Title field.
Tap the Description field to enter the event description.
Type "We will explore product launch." in the Description field.
Tap the start date field to change the date to this Friday.
Tap on October 20, 2023, in the date picker to set the event date to this Friday.
Tap the OK button to confirm the selected date for the event.
Tap the start time field to change the time to 11:00 AM.
Tap on the 11 in the clock face to set the start time to 11:00 AM.
Tap the OK button to confirm the start time of 11:00 AM for the event.
Tap the end time field to set the event duration to 45 minutes.
Tap on the 45 in the minutes section of the clock face to set the end time to 11:45 AM.
Tap on the 11 in the hours section of the clock face to set the end time hour to 11.
Tap on the 11 in the hours section of the clock face to set the end time hour to 11.
Tap on the 45 in the minutes section of the clock face to set the end time to 11:45 AM.
Tap the OK button to confirm the end time of 11:45 AM for the event.
Tap the Save button to create the calendar event.

task: In Simple Calendar Pro, create a calendar event for tomorrow at 15h with the title 'Meeting with HR' and the description 'We will explore annual budget. Looking forward to productive discussions.'. The event should last for 60 mins.

action.description: Launch the Calendar app to create a new event.
Tap on the date "16" to begin creating a new event for tomorrow.
Tap the "+" button to create a new calendar event.
Tap the "Event" button to start creating a new calendar event.
Type "Meeting with HR" in the Title field.
Tap on the Description field to start entering the event details.
Type "We will explore annual budget. Looking forward to productive discussions." in the Description field.
Tap on the start date field to change the date to tomorrow.
Tap on the date "16" to set the event date to tomorrow.
Tap the "OK" button to confirm the selected date for the event.
Tap on the start time field to change the time to 15:00.
Tap on the "15" hour mark to set the start time to 15:00.
Tap the "OK" button to confirm the start time of 15:00 for the event.
Tap on the end time field to change the time to 16:00.
Tap on the "16" hour mark to set the end time to 16:00.
Tap the "OK" button to confirm the end time of 16:00 for the event.
Tap the Save button to create the calendar event.

task: In Simple Calendar Pro, create a recurring calendar event titled 'Workshop on Project X' starting on 2023-10-21 at 21h. The event recurs weekly, forever, and lasts for 45 minutes each occurrence. The event description should be 'We will finalize marketing strategies. Snacks will be provided.'.

action.description: Launch the Calendar app to create a new event.
Tap the "New Event" button to create a calendar event.
Tap the "Event" button to create a new calendar event.
Type "Catch up on Campaign" into the Title field.
Tap the date field to select the correct start date of October 21, 2023.
Tap on the date "21" in the calendar to set the event start date to October 21, 2023.
Tap the "OK" button to confirm the selected date of October 21, 2023.
Tap the start time field to change it from 16:00 to 21:00.
Tap on the "21" on the clock face to set the hour to 21:00.
Tap the "OK" button to confirm the start time of 21:00.
Tap the end time field to change it from 21:00 to 21:45.
Tap on the "45" minute option in the time picker to set the end time to 21:45.
Tap on the 11 in the hours section of the clock face to set the end time hour to 11.
Tap on the "21" hour option in the time picker to set the correct hour for the end time.
Tap on the "45" minute option in the time picker to set the end time to 21:45.
Tap the "OK" button to confirm the end time of 21:45.
Tap the "No repetition" option to change the event recurrence to weekly.
Tap the "Weekly" option to set the event to recur weekly.
Tap the Description field to enter the event description.
Type 'We will finalize marketing strategies. Snacks will be provided.' into the description field.
Tap the Save button to create the recurring calendar event.
